title: Yogliy #3020
definition:
Jogli = "he is exiled"

 1) a Danite and father of Bukki who was one of the 12 rulers charged
    with the conquest of Canaan
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jogli = "he is exiled"

 1) a Danite and father of Bukki who was one of the 12 rulers charged
    with the conquest of Canaan

    NASB:  perh. led into exile, a Danite
